uiHints.label: Telegram Plugin
uiHints.help: Telegram plugin-owned routing and prompt controls for direct-message sessions.

directSessions.label: Telegram Direct Sessions
directSessions.help: DM-only routing overrides and stable prompt guidance owned by the Telegram plugin.

directSessions.enabled.label: Telegram Direct Session Routing Enabled
directSessions.enabled.help: When false, Telegram direct-session plugin overrides stay disabled even if other directSessions fields are configured.

directSessions.providerOverride.label: Telegram Direct Session Provider Override
directSessions.providerOverride.help: Optional provider override applied only to Telegram direct-message sessions, for example `ollama` or `openai-codex`.

directSessions.modelOverride.label: Telegram Direct Session Model Override
directSessions.modelOverride.help: Optional model override applied only to Telegram direct-message sessions, for example `qwen3.5:27b`.

directSessions.prependSystemContext.label: Telegram Direct Session System Context
directSessions.prependSystemContext.help: Stable system-prompt prefix prepended only for Telegram direct-message sessions. Use this for cached guidance instead of per-turn user-context injection.
